valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Mon 18 May 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Tue 19 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low mid-Atlantic 982, expected Rockall 986 by 0600 tomorrow. Low Bailey 1003 losing its identity

Viking.text:
Wind
In southwest, southeasterly 3 to 5, increasing 5 or 6 later. In northeast, easterly or southeasterly 3 to 5.
Sea state
In southwest, slight or moderate. in northeast, slight or moderate.
Weather
In southwest, fog patches at first. In northeast, rain until later.
Visibility
In southwest, moderate or good, occasionally very poor at first. In northeast, moderate or good, occasionally poor.
